args: Fix: fab/.fab-version is silently gitignored everywhere — the .fab-* pattern (repo .gitignore:29 and scaffold fragment-.gitignore:2, slash-less so it matches at any depth) swallows fab/.fab-version, defeating decision 1 (committed). Fresh clones/worktrees post-migration have no version source (config.yaml key parked/removed by fab config upgrade), so wt init / fab sync fail with "no fab version found in fab/.fab-version or config.yaml". Fix: 1) fab-kit own .gitignore gains !fab/.fab-version negation + commit fab/.fab-version (2.15.1); 2) scaffold fragment gains the same negation (verify against the mqiq negation hard-stop in the fragment merge); 3) migration hardening for existing repos (sentinel-guarded .gitignore negation append + commit instruction, since released fragments already shipped bare .fab-*) + stamp-path check-ignore warning. Tests + VERSION bump.
